fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface" /> configured with the specified arguments, or <see langword="null" /> if the arguments are not compatible with this typeface.
fields.summary: Creates a new typeface that applies the specified font arguments to this typeface.

params.args: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontArguments" /> specifying the collection index, palette, palette overrides, and variation design position.

fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface" /> using the specified palette, or <see langword="null" /> if the palette index is out of range.
fields.summary: Creates a new typeface that uses the specified color palette.

params.paletteIndex: The zero-based index of the color palette to use.

fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface" /> positioned at the specified variation design position, or <see langword="null" /> if the typeface has no variation data.
fields.summary: Creates a new typeface positioned at the specified location in the variation design space.

params.position: A read-only span of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" /> values specifying the desired axis coordinates.

fields.value: A shared <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface" /> instance that is empty (has zero glyphs). This instance is managed internally by Skia and must not be disposed.
fields.summary: Gets an empty typeface that contains no glyphs.

fields.returns: The number of variation axis entries written into <paramref name="axes" />.
fields.summary: Fills a span with the variation axis parameters for this typeface.

params.axes: A span to receive the variation axis information.

fields.returns: The number of coordinate entries written into <paramref name="coordinates" />.
fields.summary: Fills a span with the current variation design position of the typeface.

params.coordinates: A span to receive the current axis coordinates.

fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if <see cref="P:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface.GlyphCount" /> is zero; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the typeface contains no glyphs.

fields.value: The total number of variation axes, or <c>0</c> if the typeface has no variation data.
fields.summary: Gets the number of variation axes supported by the typeface.

fields.value: An array of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis" /> values describing each axis, or an empty array if the typeface has no variation data.
fields.summary: Gets information about all variation axes supported by the typeface.

fields.value: An array of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" /> values representing the current axis coordinates, or an empty array if the typeface has no variation data.
fields.summary: Gets the current variation design position of the typeface.

fields.value: The number of axis coordinates in the current variation design position, or <c>0</c> if no coordinates are set.
fields.summary: Gets the number of variation axes with explicitly set coordinates.
